description:
Keep your worries at bay when you have ICICI Lombard’s Motor Insurance!

- Avail access to our 10,000+ partner garages without any hassles
- Enjoy a cashless experience 
- Get 6 months guarantee on repairs**

Download the IL TakeCare app for a seamless claim process! Visit: (LINK) 
#ICICILombard #NibhayeVaade #ILTakeCareApp #MotorInsurance #InsuranceClaim
fulltitle: Motor Insurance Claim Process - IL TakeCare App | ICICI Lombard

comments.text: Before buying the policy, it seems like the best policy in the world. But once you purchase it, you realize how bad the policy actually is — ICICI Lombard.

comments.text:
Meri bike ke liye ek surveyer allot hua. 
Unhone mujhe call krke btaya ki apko claim nhi milega. Phir bole kyuki apka reason justify nhi ho raha hai, isliye nhi milega. 
Then maine unse ek que. Kiya sir meri bike kaha pe inspection ho rahi hai. So he told me ki service centre me. 
Phir maine pucha sir meri bike konsi hai? Unhone btaya hi nhi….aur Call cut kr diya. 
Aise aise to surveyer hai, is company me. 

22 Aug ko bike meri service center pe khadi hai. 
Aaj 14 Sep. ho gya. 
Mujhe aaj tk update nhi diye hai ye log ki karna kya hai aage. 
Na manager call pick kr rha
Na company wale final bta rahe hai. 
Ye log sirf customer ko preshaan kar rahe hai.
comments.author: @Ashutoshaudiologist

comments.text:
Aur in logo ko customer se baat krne ki tamiz nahi hai. 
Maine call recording kiya hai. 
And I’ll upload to my YouTube channel for proof.

comments.text:
This review details my experience with unexpected charges on my ICICI Lombard car insurance policy. While the initial premium for a 200,000 INR IDV (Insured Declared Value) seemed reasonable at 9211 INR, I was surprised and disappointed to learn of an additional 3800 INR charge for a simple RC (Registration Certificate) transfer.

Here's a breakdown of my concerns:

Lack of Transparency: There was no mention of this additional fee during the policy purchase process. This unexpected cost makes budgeting for car insurance difficult.
Questionable Value: The purpose and justification for a 3800 INR charge for an RC transfer seem unclear. It feels excessive for a seemingly administrative task.
This experience has unfortunately tarnished my initial impression of ICICI Lombard. While the initial premium was competitive, these additional charges raise concerns about transparency and value for money.
comments.author: @Taken991

comments.text: I filed a claim as I met an accident on 26th of December. Mrinal Banerjee 082400 53868(surveyor) interpreted the accident fact into his own story and reported the same to the organisation. According to him the ratio of impact should be high when someone should die or injured the car should get mashedup then only the claim will be taken as consistent. I called customer care Ashwin Shinde aggressively prompt me "then what can I do"  and disconnected the call. Absolutely opposite whatever its saying here in the video and never care the customer. the people are not at all cooperative and supportive and doesn't understand the pragmatic situation of the customer. requesting every one not to take this ICICI Lombard service if you are really looking for a genuine claim. The worst insurance company I ever dealt with..#ICICILombard
comments.author: @siddharthpaul4187
